Luxury Custom Home Builders Toronto
Home is where you can truly be you. Your Toronto home should reflect your needs, taste, and style. Nobody believes this more than local custom home builder Aria Build.
Aria Build is Bringing Unique Luxury
Custom Homes to Toronto & GTA

Aria Build is a family-owned company of licensed luxury custom home builders in Toronto operating since 2010. We specialize in home building and remodeling high-end homes throughout Toronto and the GTA, including the most prestigious neighborhoods like Forest Hill, Parkwoods-Donalda, St. Andrew-Windfields, and more. We build custom homes near you with only the highest quality materials by staying within your budget. We communicate clearly and openly with homeowners at every stage of the project.

We take pride in our excellent customer service and prioritize the client first and foremost. The professional team here ensures your specifications and requirements requested for your luxury custom home building project are met and exceeded. We handle all aspects building which includes the plumbing & electrical work, framing, trimming, interior and exterior finishing, waterproofing, insulation, and painting.

Our in-house team employs experienced designers, architects, engineers, and project managers. This means that we are not outsourcing our services from other contractors and have full control of every step of your luxurious custom home building. All team members work alongside one another to bring your vision to life in the most efficient and productive way possible.

Aria Build understands the value of investing in your luxury custom home in Toronto. All purchases are outlined through detailed invoicing & clients have visibility into scheduling and timeframes. Our cost breakdown is transparent and we budget the purchasing of materials and labor to fit your needs. We take the necessary safety precautions and invest in the appropriate equipment. Choose Aria Build for a seamless and rewarding custom home building experience. Let’s work together to create the home you’ve always dreamed of.

They were always honest about timelines, budgets, and quick to respond to any questions or concerns we had. I highly recommend working with Behzad and his team if you are considering building your luxury dream home in Toronto.

Aria Build delivered an outstanding experience from start to finish. Highly recommend them to anyone looking for a trustworthy, top-tier builder.

They treated our project with the same care, passion, and professionalism that you would expect from a truly experienced, family-owned custom home builder.Choosing Aria Build was hands down the best decision we could have made.Building a custom home in Toronto can be overwhelming, but working with a trustworthy and experienced builder makes all the difference. Behzad and his team were incredible every step of the way. Their dedication to quality craftsmanship and personalized service exceeded all our expectations.Now, as we prepare to move into our lakefront dream home, we’re filled with gratitude. Transformative Renovation Services You Can Trust. Our home renovation project was a massive success, all thanks to Aria Build. The team ensured that every stage of the process was stress-free and the results were beyond what we had imagined. For anyone looking for luxury home renovation services in Toronto, Aria Build is a top-notch choice that guarantees outstanding outcomes.

Their commitment to creating breathtaking custom homes and delivering unparalleled customer service is truly exceptional. We were thoroughly impressed by their innovative designs and flawless execution. If you’re in search of trusted custom home builders in Toronto, look no further than Aria Build.

Why Choose Aria Build as Luxury Custom Home Builder in Toronto

From the luxury design to the last stroke of the paintbrush, Aria Build will provide you with everything you need to build the custom home of your dreams. Our fully managed services include architectural planning, design assistance, permitting, construction, and move-in support. Our project managers will guide you through the
process of building a custom home in Toronto
We Are Here to Build Luxury Custom Homes in Toronto

Aria Build believes that every custom home is a reflection of its owners—a unique, one-of-a-kind masterpiece. Hear from our clients in Toronto and Great Toronto area as they share their experiences, challenges, and the joy of building their dream homes with us.

Modern custom home builders in Toronto are in high demand due to the unique, contemporary, and luxurious homes they can create. Unlike traditional contractors, the luxury custom home builders at Aria Build have the experience and expertise to design and build homes that feature all the latest amenities and finishes, while meeting the specific needs and wants of each client. From start to finish, the Aria Build team works closely with you to ensure that every detail of your home is perfect. Our professional builders use cutting-edge construction techniques and materials with astute attention to detail to create homes that are not only beautiful but also highly functional.

Our luxury custom home builders in Toronto can create energy-efficient and eco-friendly homes, providing clients with stylish and sustainable homes. We offer a wide range of customization options so that you can make your dream home your own! If you are considering building a modern custom home, be sure to consult with a builder from Aria Build who has extensive experience in this type of construction. With our help, we can bring your dream home to life. Your free consultation is just a phone call away.

Aria Build’s experienced professionals are trained & well-equipped with the expertise and resources to build any type of home addition. Custom home building has never been more straightforward and feasible than with Aria Build.

Aria Build strives to give homeowners the renovation of a home that is custom-styled and sustainable to last for years to come. We work closely with each homeowner to understand their unique likes & preferences and choose the materials, colors and finishes that they want for their homes.
One of the unique things about our approach at Aria Build is that we are one of the few custom home builders that offer design-build services instead of the traditional design-bid-build model.

A design-bid-build approach, which has been adopted by many custom builders, requires homeowners to find their own architect to draw up the proposed plans. Then, when this is done, the homeowner will use the drawings to apply for the city permits necessary for the building of their custom home.

Aria Build simplifies the home building process for homeowners by eliminating unnecessary steps and stress and offering a streamlined process. Our design-build model makes it possible to get all your custom home-building services under one roof. Say goodbye to the traditional design-bid-build approach and team up with a reputable custom home builder who will handle everything in-house.
Aria Build is your one-stop shop for custom home building in Toronto. In addition to design services, we offer

Luxury custom home design is the process of designing a home that is specifically tailored to the needs and wants of the homeowner. At Aria Build, we understand that everyone has their own unique vision for their perfect home. That’s why we offer custom home designs, giving our clients the flexibility to plan how they want their homes to look and function. There are many benefits to working with a designer, including the ability to create a home that perfectly suits your needs and lifestyle. Custom home designers also have a deep understanding of the construction process, and can work with you to ensure that your project stays on schedule and within budget.
Custom Home Construction

Custom home construction is the process of building a home that is specifically designed for each particular client. Unlike subdivisions, which are built the same way regardless of who buys them, custom homes are unique to each buyer. As a result, custom home construction offers many benefits over purchasing a spec home. The custom home contractors at Aria Build work closely with clients to ensure that every detail of the home meets their needs and wants.

We have a team of architects, engineers, and craftsmen who work together to design and build the custom home. The contractor is responsible for coordinating all of the different trades and ensuring that the home is built to the specifications of the client. In addition, luxury custom homes can be designed to take advantage of specific features of the lot on which they will be built. As a result, custom home construction offers buyers the opportunity to create a truly one-of-a-kind home that perfectly suits their needs and lifestyle. Custom home construction can be an exciting and rewarding experience for everybody to enjoy, no matter what stage of home ownership you are in! What Is the Difference Between a Custom Home and A Regular Home?

The key difference between a custom home and a regular – traditional – home is the level of flexibility, quality, and customization that a custom home offers. Although both will serve the purpose of providing spaces for your family to live and grow in, a custom home will allow you to create a completely unique experience throughout, creating a space that you truly love to spend time in.

Regular homes are accompanied by feature lists and material, styling, and design restrictions. Custom home – when completed with good builders and designers – will allow you to craft the space of your dreams, regardless of how wild it may seem.

Is a New Custom Home Better than A Full Renovation?

Although a custom home is certainly an exciting venture, the benefit that can be derived from a full renovation can be equally as exciting. The decision depends fully on your specific needs and living requirements, such as space, location, amenities, and more. Your decision should be based on whichever of the two will allow you to live the most comfortable throughout the years ahead.
